text.title: Team Development Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure to apply team-development end-to-end. Each step names inputs, action, output, and optional decision-gate.

step.name: ingest-signals
step.input: Team roster, last-N retros, throughput / cycle-time CSV, 1:1 notes (redacted)
step.action: Redact individual names; load skills taxonomy; assemble agent context with prior synthesised theme files (≥ 3).
step.decision-gate: If retro corpus < 2 sprints, switch to "Forming workshop" branch from decision tree.

step.name: stage-team
step.decision-gate: If `tuckman_confidence < 0.5`, mark report `draft` and request human review before next step.

step.name: charter-draft-or-refresh
step.input: Roster + project context + (if Storming) conflict-pattern hints
step.action: Run team-charter-builder. Emit charter draft marked `co_authored: false`; schedule a 60-minute workshop where the team finalises it.

step.name: skills-matrix-and-gap-plan
step.action: Run skills-matrix-analyzer. `?` for unknown. For every gap evaluate ALL four options (training, pairing, contracting, hiring) with cost + time.
step.decision-gate: Reject if any `chosen_option` is `hiring` without explicit training/pairing fail-reason.

step.name: retro-synth
step.input: Last N retros + prior theme files
step.action: Run retro-synthesiser. Emit `themes` with `evidence_sprints` length ≥ 2; single-sprint observations go to `single_sprint_observations`.

step.name: validate-and-publish
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-team-development.py --file report.json`. On pass, commit to `.aidocs/team-reports/<team_id>-<date>.json`. PM acts on gap plan + themes within next sprint planning.
